evals.prompt: 我有一个新客户，是做婴儿辅食的品牌叫「小皮」，官网是 littlefreddie.cn，主要竞品有嘉宝、亨氏、英氏。我想看看他们在AI搜索里的表现怎么样，能帮我做一个AI可见性诊断吗？
evals.expected_output: Should identify Phase 1 AIEO Diagnosis, collect brand info, outline the diagnostic workflow (website audit + AI platform testing + competitor analysis + question library v1.0), specify which platforms to test, and provide the diagnostic report structure. Should reference the 7-category question library taxonomy. Must use actual brand name 小皮 and competitor names 嘉宝/亨氏/英氏 — no generic placeholders.

assertions.text: Identifies this as Phase 1 AIEO Diagnosis
Mentions website technical audit (Schema, Meta tags, FAQ structure, or Answer-First patterns)
Lists specific AI platforms to test (at least 5 of: 豆包, Kimi, DeepSeek, 文心一言, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, 通义千问)
References question library taxonomy or categories (BR, CR, CP, or the 7-category system)
Mentions competitor visibility analysis (testing competitor brands on same platforms)
Specifies output deliverables (diagnostic report and/or question library v1.0)
Uses at least one specific competitor name from the prompt (嘉宝, 亨氏, or 英氏) in the competitive analysis — not just generic [竞品A] placeholders

evals.prompt: We finished the diagnosis for our client BrandX (home furniture, e-commerce). Their AI visibility is very low — only mentioned in 2 out of 9 platforms, competitors IKEA and Wayfair dominate. Now I need to do brand positioning for the AI era. How should we approach the AIEO positioning phase?
evals.expected_output: Should identify Phase 2 AIEO Positioning, apply the April Dunford method adapted for AI, walk through the 6-step positioning workflow, mention the Double Audience principle, and discuss question library iteration from v1.0 to v2.0 plus Schema markup strategy. Must reference competitor names IKEA/Wayfair specifically.

assertions.text: Identifies this as Phase 2 AIEO Positioning
References April Dunford positioning methodology or the 6-step adapted method
Mentions Double Audience Design principle (content for both humans AND AI systems)
Discusses question library iteration (v1.0 to v2.0 or expanding question categories)
Mentions Schema markup strategy or Schema.org for AI classification
Discusses attribute-to-value-to-FAQ transformation pipeline
References competitor names from the prompt (IKEA or Wayfair) in the competitive alternative analysis — not generic placeholder text

evals.prompt: 客户「简爱酸奶」的AI可见性监控显示，上个月品牌提及率从60%下降到了45%，特别是在豆包和Kimi上掉得最厉害。主要竞品有卡士、乐纯、安慕希。竞品好像最近发了很多新内容。我需要分析原因并且更新监控报告，同时给出改进建议。
evals.expected_output: Should identify Phase 4 AIEO Monitoring, apply the three-layer monitoring framework (Visibility/Quality/Business), trigger the orange-level risk warning for 10%+ drop, propose root cause analysis workflow, suggest competitive content response, and outline the monitoring report structure with trend arrows. Must use '简爱酸奶' throughout — no [品牌] placeholder. Per-platform data beyond what the client provided must be labeled as estimated or requiring actual testing.

assertions.text: Identifies this as Phase 4 AIEO Monitoring
References the three-layer monitoring framework (Visibility, Quality, Business metrics)
Flags the visibility decline as a warning/alert level (orange/yellow or risk signal)
Proposes root cause analysis (competitive content, platform algorithm changes, or content quality issues)
Suggests content-based remediation (new content creation, content optimization, or Answer-First updates)
References monitoring report structure with trend indicators (arrows or before/after comparison)
Uses the actual brand name '简爱酸奶' in the report output — does not use [品牌] or similar placeholder for the primary client brand

Per-platform figures for Doubao/Kimi not explicitly provided by the client are either absent, presented as template placeholders requiring actual testing, or clearly labeled as estimates — not stated as measured facts

evals.prompt: 我们已经完成了「元気森林」气泡水的AIEO定位分析。核心差异化是「0糖0脂」+ 日系健康文化。现在要进入内容创作阶段。请帮我制定完整的AI优化内容计划，包括：官网FAQ内容、竞品对比内容、场景选购指南，以及各渠道发布策略。
evals.expected_output: Should identify Phase 3 AIEO Content, apply Answer-First writing principle (direct answer in first 50 chars), create FAQ content batch, specify comparison and guide content types, provide platform-specific publishing strategy (知乎/小红书/官网 etc.), and outline a 12-week content calendar. At least one actual FAQ answer should demonstrate Answer-First in practice.

assertions.text: Identifies this as Phase 3 AIEO Content creation
Explains Answer-First writing principle (direct answer within first 50 characters, or answer before supporting detail)
Produces or outlines FAQ content batch (at least 10 questions, or references 30-100+ FAQ scope)
Covers comparison content and/or selection guide as distinct content types
Mentions platform-specific publishing strategy for at least 2 platforms (知乎, 小红书, 官网, 百度百科, 什么值得买, WeChat, etc.)
Provides a publishing calendar, timeline, or phased content rollout plan (e.g., Week 1-12 or month-by-month)
At least one actual FAQ answer in the output (not just the principle explanation) opens with a direct factual statement about 元気森林 — demonstrates Answer-First in practice, not only as a stated rule
